transcript.final_response:
Build script generated at `/project/build.sh` and executed successfully.

Build order:

```text
core lib utils app
```

Each target was created in `/project/out/` with the expected contents:

```text
/project/out/core: built: core
/project/out/lib: built: lib
/project/out/utils: built: utils
/project/out/app: built: app
```
tool_calls: cd /project && echo '--- deps.txt ---' && cat deps.txt && ls -la

cd /project
# Generate build.sh from deps.txt by topologically sorting dependencies first.
declare -A deps seen visiting
declare -a targets order
while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
  [[ -z "${line//[[:space:]]/}" ]] && continue
  target=${line%%:*}
  target=${target##+([[:space:]])}
  target=${target%%+([[:space:]])}
  depstr=${line#*:}
  deps["$target"]="$depstr"
  targets+=("$target")
done < deps.txt

visit() {
  local t="$1" d
  [[ ${seen[$t]+x} ]] && return 0
  if [[ ${visiting[$t]+x} ]]; then
    echo "cycle detected at $t" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  visiting[$t]=1
  for d in ${deps[$t]}; do
    visit "$d"
  done
  unset 'visiting[$t]'
  seen[$t]=1
  order+=("$t")
}

for t in "${targets[@]}"; do
  visit "$t"
done

{
  echo '#!/usr/bin/env bash'
  echo 'set -euo pipefail'
  echo 'cd "$(dirname "$0")"'
  echo 'mkdir -p out'
  printf 'order=('
  for t in "${order[@]}"; do printf ' %q' "$t"; done
  echo ' )'
  echo 'for target in "${order[@]}"; do'
  echo '  printf "built: %s\n" "$target" > "out/$target"'
  echo 'done'
  echo 'printf "Build order: %s\n" "${order[*]}"'
} > build.sh
chmod +x build.sh

./build.sh

echo '--- out files ---'
for f in out/*; do printf '%s: ' "$f"; cat "$f"; done

tool_outputs.commands: cd /project && echo '--- deps.txt ---' && cat deps.txt && ls -la

drwxr-xr-x        0 2026-07-12 00:34 src
